items.claim: Cody Garbrandt will likely avoid engaging in the fight during the first round.
items.quote: in the first round, Cody's probably going to be avoiding the fight at all costs.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov is defensively irresponsible and hittable.
items.quote: Nikita Krylov, a little bit more hittable, a little bit defensively irresponsible.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will be faster than Nikita Krylov due to moving up from lower weight classes.
items.quote: Robert Whittaker, the smaller fighter coming up from 185 and previously 170, should be a lot faster than Nikita Krylov.

items.claim: Bobby Green lacks the durability to weather a high-intensity early attack from Terrance McKinney.
items.quote: I don't think Bobby Green has the durability to weather the Terrance McKinney storm.

items.claim: Brandon Royval can cause issues for Loni Cavana by utilizing his range and jab.
items.quote: I think that he could give Loni Cavana issues with the range. I feel like he could get in Loni's face. He could toss that jab at Loni

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has made significant improvements to his grappling defense.
items.quote: I think Cory Sandhagen has made big strides in his grappling. He got up every single time Merab took him down.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is currently suffering from a staph infection.
items.quote: the Benoît Saint Denis, the the staff infection worries me.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has not fought a fighter in their prime in the last 5 to 6 years.
items.quote: this is the first fighter that Paddy's fighting that's like actually in his prime.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's effective window to win the fight is limited to the first one or two minutes.
items.quote: He has a 1-minute to 2-minute window to win this fight.

items.claim: Max Holloway has been more active and fighting higher-level competition than Conor McGregor over the last five years.
items.quote: I'm going to pick the guy who's been active. The guy who's fought in 5 years. The guy who's been fighting high-level fighters.
